title: 21:06 ГўВЂВ” February 8, 2021
body_text:
21:06 ГўВЂВ” February 8, 2021
CEBA Forgiveness Refund Update
We updated the Type of Payment section on the CEBA Program ГўВЂВ“ Repayment form in ServiceNow.
Document Library
Status
Central 1 Facilitated CEBA Application Procedures ГўВЂВ“ Quick Reference Guide
9140
Chapter 4, Completing the CEBA Repayment Form in ServiceNow; Step
ГўВ‘В®
Type of Payment
We changed ГўВЂВњPrincipal Refund Due to OverpaymentГўВЂВќ to ГўВЂВњPrincipal Forgiveness Refund Due to OverpaymentГўВЂВќ to clarify that this data element should only be used if a customer makes a payment more than the non-forgivable portion, not realizing they are entitled to forgiveness. If the customer requests a refund of the applicable forgiveness amount, the amount is entered in this data element.
This data element is not to enable refunds or reversals of principal payments in any other case
.
Revised
